title: Radiation
body:
- Adds Uranium, Plutonium, Radium, Thorium, Radiation Alloy and Anti Matter 
---
- Uranium Used for Rods which can be used as fuel, can make uranium glass and reinforced version has a block and nugget and used in many recipes

- Plutonium Used for creating a smithing template with Armor and Tools above netherite tier, can be used to create a chip, has a block and nugget and can be used in many recipes

- Radium Used for making lamps, batteries and more, has a block and nugget, can be used in many recipes

- Thorium Used for crafting an Alloying Furnace which can smelt thorium into thorium steel, and raw radiation alloy into radiation alloy ingot, can be used for batterie, has a block and nugget, can be used for many recipes

- Radiation Alloy Used for making nuclear bombs, creating extractor to create anti matter has a block and nugget, used for many recipes

- Anti Matter can be used for insanely powerfull anti matter sword and wip
---

- Uranium spawns normally like diamonds
- Plutonium spawns in the end and in dripstone caves
- Radium spawns in the nether as blackstone and basalt
- Thorium spawns in moutains or under mountains spawns like iron
- Radiation alloy made from 2 uranium, 1 raw plutonium and 1 radium
- Anti Matter can be made in extractor with glass bottle and using 2 uranium rods or radiation      alloy ingot

and many more stuff

next update adds more sulfur additions, polonium violet color and most dangerous, fixes and balance changes
